sentences.arabic: سَمِعَ الطُّلَّابُ الْمَثَلَ: «طَالِبُ الْعِلْمِ لَا يَشِيخُ».
sentences.translation: Učenici su čuli poslovicu: «Tražilac znanja ne stari».
sentences.translationEn: The students heard the proverb: «The seeker of knowledge does not grow old».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ التَّعَلُّمَ يُبْقِي الْعَقْلَ حَيًّا وَنَشِيطًا.
sentences.translation: To znači da učenje drži um živim i aktivnim.
sentences.translationEn: This means that learning keeps the mind alive and active.

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَتِ الْجَدَّةُ اسْتِخْدَامَ الْحَاسُوبِ وَهِيَ فِي السِّتِّينَ.
sentences.translation: Baka je naučila koristiti kompjuter s šezdeset godina.
sentences.translationEn: The grandmother learned to use the computer at sixty years old.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ سَعِيدَةً وَقَالَتْ: «التَّعَلُّمُ لَا يَنْتَهِي أَبَدًا».
sentences.translation: Bila je sretna i rekla: «Učenje nikada ne završava».
sentences.translationEn: She was happy and said: «Learning never ends».
